styleGuide: Vertical 9:16 cinematic historical documentary stills set in 16th-century Strasbourg. Keep the look grounded and realistic: muted sepia and slate-blue palette, realistic faces, detailed linen and wool clothing, natural daylight or dusk, atmospheric dust, shallow depth of field, and strong period authenticity. Avoid modern objects, neon colors, fantasy styling, anachronisms, visible text, watermarks, borders, gore, low-resolution detail, and cartoon/anime rendering.

images.narration: 1518년 스트라스부르의 한 거리에서, 한 여자가 멈추지 못한 채 춤을 추기 시작했습니다.
images.prompt: Cinematic historical documentary illustration of 16th-century Strasbourg, vertical 9:16 composition, muted sepia and slate-blue palette, realistic faces, detailed linen and wool clothing, natural daylight, atmospheric dust, shallow depth of field, no modern objects, no text, high detail, grounded medieval realism, a woman suddenly dancing in a narrow cobblestone street while shocked merchants and children watch from the sides.
images.negativePrompt: modern objects, smartphones, text, captions, watermark, logo, border, low resolution, blurry, oversaturated colors, cartoon, anime, fantasy, sci-fi, anachronistic clothing, extra limbs, deformed hands, distorted faces

images.narration: 처음엔 광기처럼 보였지만, 며칠 뒤엔 수십 명이 거리에서 함께 흔들렸습니다. 도시는 더 불안해졌습니다.
images.prompt: Cinematic historical documentary illustration of a crowded town square in 16th-century Strasbourg, vertical 9:16 composition, muted sepia and slate-blue palette, realistic faces, detailed linen and wool clothing, natural daylight, atmospheric dust, shallow depth of field, no modern objects, no text, high detail, grounded medieval realism, exhausted townspeople involuntarily dancing, some collapsing and clutching their feet while others look on in fear.
